Sword.description: Sword is one of the most straightforward damage items in Spelltroum. While many players overlook it because it only provides damage, Sword offers a surprisingly large amount of attack power for its cost. For heroes that simply need more physical damage, it is often one of the most efficient upgrades available.
Sword.whyUse: Sword is a great choice when your goal is simple: deal more damage. Unlike utility items that provide armor, mana, or movement speed, Sword focuses entirely on increasing attack power. This makes it especially effective for aggressive heroes who rely on basic attacks to farm, pressure opponents, and secure eliminations. Many players underestimate Sword because of its simple design, but the amount of damage it provides for its cost can have a major impact throughout the match.
strengths: Strong throughout all stages of the game
weaknesses: Provides no survivability
Offers no mobility or utility
Less valuable for heroes that primarily rely on spell damage
tips: If Sword allows your hero to destroy bushes in one hit, you do not always need to upgrade it immediately.
A single Sword upgrade is often enough to reach important farming breakpoints.
Consider investing gold into other items first if additional Sword levels do not significantly improve farming speed.
If the match goes into the late game, fully upgrading Sword can provide a large damage boost.
Sword is most effective on heroes that already have abilities that strengthen their attacks.

bestHeroes.freezi: Her attack speed bonuses make every point of additional damage more valuable. Combined with rapid attacks, Sword significantly increases damage output and farming efficiency.
bestHeroes.shadow-fury: Her attacks can reduce enemy armor, allowing increased damage to hit even harder. As Sword is upgraded, she becomes capable of dealing devastating burst damage.
bestHeroes.druid: His abilities already add extra attack damage, making bonus damage more valuable. Sword also helps destroy bushes faster for more efficient farming.

faq.q: Is Sword a good early game item?
faq.a: Yes. Sword can significantly increase your farming speed and help you reach important damage thresholds early in the match.

faq.q: Should I always upgrade Sword to Level 4?
faq.a: Not necessarily. If the first upgrade already allows you to destroy bushes in one hit, it may be more efficient to invest gold into other items first and finish Sword later.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit the most from Sword?
faq.a: Heroes that rely on physical attacks, especially Shadow Fury and Furion, gain the most value from Sword.

BladesOfAttack.whyUse: Lethal Claws is designed for players who want to maximize their damage potential. While the item provides less direct damage than Sword, it compensates by granting critical strike chance. As heroes gain more damage from levels, abilities, and items, every successful critical hit becomes significantly more valuable. The item is especially effective on heroes that already have strong physical attacks or abilities that scale with physical damage. Since critical strike chance stacks additively with other sources, Lethal Claws becomes even stronger when combined with abilities or items that provide additional critical strike chance. The tradeoff is consistency — while the average damage can be very high, critical hits are never guaranteed.
strengths: Critical hits deal 50% additional physical damage
Scales well with other damage items
Critical strike chance stacks with other sources
Effective on both attacks and physical damage abilities
weaknesses: Less consistent than Sword
Damage depends on chance
Can be unreliable when stable damage is required
Provides no defensive bonuses
May underperform during short fights if critical hits do not trigger
tips: Lethal Claws becomes stronger as your total physical damage increases.
Critical strike chance stacks with other critical strike bonuses from items and hero abilities.
Heroes with built-in critical strike effects can reach very high critical strike chances when using Lethal Claws.
Physical damage abilities can benefit from critical strikes just like basic attacks.
Consider combining Lethal Claws with other physical damage items to maximize burst damage.
The item is most effective when you are willing to trade consistency for higher damage potential.

bestHeroes.shadow-fury: Her charged shot deals physical damage and can critically strike. When a critical hit occurs on a fully charged attack, the damage can become devastating and may instantly eliminate fragile enemies.
bestHeroes.druid: Has abilities that increase attack damage. When a critical strike occurs alongside his damage bonus effects, the result can be an enormous burst of damage.
bestHeroes.grizzly: Naturally builds up damage against single targets. As his attacks become stronger, critical strikes become increasingly dangerous and can quickly swing a fight.

faq.q: Do critical hits affect abilities?
faq.a: Yes. Physical damage abilities can critically strike and benefit from critical damage bonuses.

faq.q: How much extra damage does a critical hit deal?
faq.a: Critical hits deal 50% additional physical damage.

faq.q: Does critical strike chance stack?
faq.a: Yes. Critical strike chance from Lethal Claws stacks with critical strike bonuses from other items and hero abilities.

faq.q: Is Lethal Claws better than Sword?
faq.a: Not always. Sword provides reliable and consistent damage, while Lethal Claws offers higher damage potential at the cost of consistency.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Lethal Claws?
faq.a: Heroes with high physical damage, such as Shadow Fury, Furion, and Grizzly, gain the most value from the item.

faq.q: Is Lethal Claws good in PvE?
faq.a: It can be powerful, but some players prefer more consistent damage sources when completing PvE content where predictable damage is important.

BladesOfAttack.description: Lethal Claws is an offensive item that combines bonus attack damage with critical strike chance. Unlike Sword, which provides a consistent increase in damage, Lethal Claws offers the potential for powerful burst damage through critical hits. The item is most effective on heroes with high base damage or abilities that deal physical damage.

Dagger.whyUse: Dagger is an excellent choice for players who want to maximize physical damage against enemy heroes. The item's armor reduction effect applies a debuff to the target, lowering their physical armor for a short duration — allowing all allies attacking that target to deal more damage. The effect becomes especially powerful against enemies with low armor. If a target's armor is reduced to zero or below, incoming physical damage increases significantly. Because the armor reduction is applied directly to the enemy rather than granted as bonus damage to the attacker, Dagger remains effective for the entire team throughout the fight, making it one of the strongest team-oriented damage items in Spelltroum.
strengths: Increases damage dealt by all allies attacking the target
Extremely effective in coordinated team fights
Synergizes well with heroes that already reduce armor
Excellent item for focused target elimination
weaknesses: Provides no defensive bonuses
Less effective if enemies are not being focused by multiple attackers
Delivers less direct damage than some pure damage items
Requires consistent pressure on key targets to gain maximum value
tips: Focus attacks on a single target to maximize the value of the armor reduction effect.
Dagger becomes stronger when multiple allies attack the same enemy.
The item is particularly effective against enemies with low armor.
Heroes with existing armor reduction abilities gain exceptional value from Dagger.
In team fights, apply the debuff to the highest-priority target first.
Dagger is especially powerful in 2v2 matches where both teammates can focus the same enemy.

bestHeroes.druid: Can summon a creature from bushes to fight alongside him. Once Dagger reduces an enemy's armor, both Furion and his summoned companion benefit from the increased damage against that target.
bestHeroes.volcarn: Already has abilities that reduce enemy armor. Combined with Dagger, enemies become even more vulnerable, allowing Volcarn and teammates to deal significantly higher damage.
bestHeroes.shadow-fury: Relies heavily on physical damage and already has abilities that reduce enemy armor. Dagger amplifies this strength even further with an additional armor reduction effect.

faq.q: How do I unlock Dagger?
faq.a: Dagger is unlocked by upgrading Druid. As you progress with Druid and improve the hero, you will eventually gain access to this Legendary item.

faq.q: Does Dagger only increase my damage?
faq.a: No. Dagger reduces the target's armor, allowing all allies to deal more physical damage to that enemy.

faq.q: Is Dagger good in 2v2?
faq.a: Yes. Dagger is particularly strong in 2v2 because both teammates can benefit from the armor reduction effect when focusing the same target.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Dagger?
faq.a: Heroes that deal physical damage or already have armor reduction effects, such as Druid, Volcarn, and Shadow Fury, gain the most value from Dagger.

faq.q: Is Dagger better against low-armor enemies?
faq.a: Yes. The closer an enemy is to zero armor, the more impactful additional armor reduction becomes.

faq.q: Does Dagger work with summoned units?
faq.a: Yes. Summoned units also benefit from attacking enemies whose armor has been reduced by Dagger.

Dagger.description: Dagger is a Legendary offensive item that combines physical damage with armor reduction. Every attack applies a weakening effect to enemies, reducing their physical armor and making them more vulnerable to incoming damage. Unlike most damage items, Dagger can increase the damage dealt by the entire team.

AssaultSpear.whyUse: Assault Spear is an excellent choice for heroes that rely on frequent attacks. The item increases both attack speed and damage, allowing heroes to farm faster and deal more damage during fights. At the same time, every successful attack restores health, helping the hero stay active on the battlefield longer. Unlike burst-oriented damage items, Assault Spear rewards constant aggression. Heroes that attack quickly can trigger the healing effect repeatedly, turning small amounts of healing into a significant advantage over time. The item is especially effective during extended fights where the healing can accumulate through dozens of attacks.
strengths: Provides attack speed and physical damage
Effective throughout all stages of the game
weaknesses: Healing is less noticeable during short fights
Requires frequent attacks to gain maximum value
Less effective on heroes that rely primarily on spell damage
Provides no armor or direct defensive bonuses
tips: Assault Spear becomes stronger as your attack speed increases.
Heroes that attack rapidly gain the most value from the healing effect.
The item helps maintain health while farming bushes and monsters.
Assault Spear is often more effective in long fights than in short burst engagements.
Consider fully upgrading the item if your build relies heavily on basic attacks.
Sustained damage heroes generally benefit more from Assault Spear than burst damage heroes.

bestHeroes.spitfire: Already benefits from attack speed bonuses, allowing him to trigger the healing effect more frequently. The additional attack speed and damage also improve farming speed and make it easier to pressure opponents.
bestHeroes.freezi: Benefits greatly thanks to her naturally high attack speed. Since the healing effect triggers on every successful attack, Freezi can recover health more frequently than many other heroes.

faq.q: How do I unlock Assault Spear?
faq.a: Assault Spear is available from the beginning of the game. Like all Mystic items, it does not require hero progression to unlock and can be used by any player.

faq.q: Does Assault Spear heal when attacking bushes?
faq.a: Yes. Successful attacks against bushes can trigger the healing effect.

faq.q: Does Assault Spear heal when attacking enemy heroes?
faq.a: Yes. Every successful attack can restore health.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Assault Spear?
faq.a: Spitfire and Freezi are among the strongest users because they can attack rapidly and trigger the healing effect more often.

faq.q: Is Assault Spear a damage item or a survivability item?
faq.a: It is both. Assault Spear increases attack speed and damage while also providing health recovery through its healing effect.

AssaultSpear.description: Assault Spear is an item that combines attack speed, physical damage, and health recovery. In addition to increasing offensive power, the item restores health whenever the owner successfully lands an attack. This unique combination makes Assault Spear one of the best sustain items for attack-based heroes.

BoneSword.whyUse: Bone Sword is designed for heroes that can turn its drawback into an advantage. The item provides a large amount of health, bonus damage, critical strike bonuses, and additional damage based on hero level. At higher levels, the scaling damage alone can become a massive source of power. However, every attack consumes health — heroes that lack healing, lifesteal, or some form of health recovery may struggle to use it effectively. The item shines on heroes that can sustain themselves through combat or benefit from having lower health. For those heroes, the self-damage becomes a manageable cost rather than a weakness.
strengths: Grants a large amount of bonus health
Provides strong damage scaling through hero levels
Extremely powerful on heroes with sustain
weaknesses: Every attack consumes health
Self-damage occurs even if attacks miss
Requires healing, lifesteal, or sustain to reach full potential
Can be difficult to use effectively on fragile heroes
Critical strike chance is relatively low without additional sources
tips: Bone Sword cannot kill its owner, making it safer than it may initially appear.
The item becomes stronger as your hero gains levels.
Heroes with lifesteal gain significantly more value from Bone Sword.
Heroes that benefit from low health can turn the self-damage into an advantage.
The item works best when paired with reliable healing or sustain.
Do not purchase Bone Sword solely for its critical strike chance — the bonus is relatively small on its own.

bestHeroes.volcarn: Gains attack speed as his health decreases. Bone Sword continuously reduces his health while attacking, naturally activating his attack speed bonuses. His natural sustain further helps offset the self-damage effect.
bestHeroes.death-slayer: His built-in lifesteal allows him to recover health while attacking, helping compensate for the health lost. He also benefits from the critical strike bonuses through his existing critical strike abilities.

faq.q: How do I unlock Bone Sword?
faq.a: Bone Sword is unlocked by upgrading Volcarn.

faq.q: Can Bone Sword kill its owner?
faq.a: No. Bone Sword's self-damage effect cannot reduce the owner's health to zero.

faq.q: Does Bone Sword deal self-damage if my attack misses?
faq.a: Yes. The self-damage effect activates whenever you attack, regardless of whether the attack hits a target.

faq.q: Is Bone Sword good for Volcarn?
faq.a: Yes. Bone Sword is one of Volcarn's strongest items because the self-damage helps activate his attack speed bonuses while providing significant offensive power.

faq.q: Is Bone Sword a critical strike item?
faq.a: Not primarily. While Bone Sword provides some critical strike chance and increases maximum critical strike damage, it is usually purchased for its scaling damage, bonus health, and unique self-damage mechanics.

faq.q: Why does Bone Sword become stronger later in the match?
faq.a: Bone Sword grants additional damage based on hero level. As your hero levels up, the item's damage bonus continues to increase.

BoneSword.description: Bone Sword is a Legendary item unlocked by upgrading Volcarn. It offers a powerful combination of damage, health, critical strike bonuses, and level scaling — but every attack drains a portion of the owner's health. Fortunately, Bone Sword cannot kill its owner.

WarriorAxe.whyUse: Axe of War is ideal for heroes that want a little bit of everything. The item provides bonus damage to improve farming and combat effectiveness, bonus health to increase survivability, and movement speed to help heroes engage, chase enemies, and reposition during fights. One of the biggest advantages of Axe of War is that it can partially replace the need for movement-focused items. Some heroes do not require the large movement speed bonus provided by Boots but still benefit greatly from a moderate speed increase. Axe of War allows those heroes to gain movement speed while also improving their combat stats. Because of this flexibility, Axe of War remains useful throughout every stage of the match.
strengths: Provides damage, health, and movement speed
Strong early-game and mid-game power spike
Helps heroes destroy bushes more efficiently
Works well on a wide variety of heroes
weaknesses: Does not excel in any single category
Provides less movement speed than dedicated Boots items
Provides less damage than pure offensive items
May be outperformed by specialized items in highly optimized builds
tips: The first upgrade often provides enough damage to destroy bushes in a single attack.
The second upgrade grants a significant health increase, making your hero noticeably harder to eliminate.
Axe of War is especially valuable for heroes that do not need the full movement speed provided by Boots.
The item is often strongest when upgraded early in the match.
Consider Axe of War if your build lacks either survivability or mobility.
Balanced stat items often provide more consistent value than highly specialized items.

bestHeroes.mortifier: The bonus damage increases the effectiveness of his attacks, while the additional health improves survivability. Since Mortifier can trigger additional attacks through his abilities, every point of bonus damage becomes more valuable.
bestHeroes.death-slayer: A melee hero that often struggles to stay on top of fleeing targets. Axe of War solves several problems at once by providing additional damage, survivability, and movement speed.
bestHeroes.grizzly: As a melee hero, he values movement speed for chasing enemies, health for surviving fights, and damage for offensive pressure. Axe of War strengthens all of these areas simultaneously.

faq.q: How do I unlock Axe of War?
faq.a: Axe of War is unlocked through the Daily Rewards system. Simply log in to the game and claim your daily rewards to eventually unlock the item.

faq.q: Is Axe of War a damage item or a defensive item?
faq.a: Both. Axe of War provides damage, health, and movement speed, making it one of the most balanced items in the game.

faq.q: Is Axe of War a good first item?
faq.a: Yes. Many players choose Axe of War as an early upgrade because it immediately improves multiple aspects of their hero.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Axe of War?
faq.a: Mortifier, Death Slayer, and Grizzly are among the heroes that gain the most value from Axe of War.

faq.q: Does Axe of War help with farming?
faq.a: Yes. The early damage bonus often allows heroes to destroy bushes in a single attack, significantly improving farming efficiency.

faq.q: Should I buy Boots if I already have Axe of War?
faq.a: It depends on the hero. Some heroes still benefit from dedicated movement speed items, while others gain enough mobility from Axe of War and can use their remaining item slots for other purposes.

WarriorAxe.description: Axe of War is a versatile offensive item that provides a balanced combination of damage, health, and movement speed. Unlike specialized items that focus on a single stat, Axe of War improves several core attributes at once, making it one of the most flexible items in Spelltroum.

FireAxe.whyUse: Fire Axe is an excellent choice for heroes that want to pressure enemies over time rather than relying entirely on burst damage. The item's burning effect continues damaging enemies long after the initial attack. While each damage tick may seem small, the total damage can become significant over multiple engagements. One of the most valuable aspects of Fire Axe is its ability to delay enemy health regeneration — since burning damage continues for several seconds, affected enemies cannot begin their natural regeneration until the burn expires. This makes Fire Axe especially effective against heroes that rely on disengaging and recovering between fights.
strengths: Applies pure damage that ignores armor
Synergizes well with other damage-over-time effects
Useful throughout all stages of the game
weaknesses: Lower burst damage than some offensive items
Requires repeated attacks to maintain pressure
Damage is spread over time instead of delivered instantly
Less effective if enemies can quickly finish fights before the burn becomes impactful
tips: The first upgrade provides enough damage for many heroes to destroy bushes in a single attack.
The second upgrade grants movement speed comparable to basic boots.
Fire Damage ignores both Physical Armor and Magic Armor.
Burning enemies cannot begin natural health regeneration until the burn effect ends.
Fire Axe is particularly effective against heroes that rely on shields.
The item excels at harassment and repeated hit-and-run attacks.
Damage-over-time effects become more valuable during long fights.

bestHeroes.viverna: Already specializes in damage over time through poison effects. Fire Axe adds another source of periodic damage, allowing both effects to stack and continuously pressure enemies. The movement speed also helps her reposition and maintain distance.
bestHeroes.faerie: After casting spells, a single attack can apply the burning effect and continue damaging the target while Faerie repositions and waits for cooldowns. Allows her to maintain pressure even when not actively casting.

faq.q: How do I unlock Fire Axe?
faq.a: Fire Axe is available from the beginning of the game. Like all Mystic items, it does not require hero progression to unlock.

faq.q: Does Fire Damage ignore armor?
faq.a: Yes. Fire Damage is pure damage and is not reduced by either Physical Armor or Magic Armor.

faq.q: Does Fire Axe prevent health regeneration?
faq.a: Yes. While the burning effect is active, the target continues taking damage and cannot begin natural health regeneration.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Fire Axe?
faq.a: Viverna and Faerie are among the strongest users because they can combine its burn effect with their existing damage-over-time and poke abilities.

faq.q: Is Fire Axe a farming item or a fighting item?
faq.a: Both. Early upgrades improve farming through bonus damage, while later upgrades provide movement speed and powerful damage-over-time effects for combat.

FireAxe.description: Fire Axe is a Mystic item that combines physical damage, movement speed, and a powerful burning effect. At higher levels, attacks ignite enemies and apply Fire Damage over time for 4 seconds. Unlike most damage sources, Fire Damage deals pure damage not reduced by Physical or Magic Armor.

ManaAxe.whyUse: Mana Axe is designed to punish mana-dependent heroes. Each attack burns mana from the target and converts the burned mana into pure damage. Unlike Physical or Magic Damage, this damage is not reduced by armor, making it effective against a wide variety of enemies. The item becomes especially powerful against heroes that rely heavily on abilities — by draining their mana, Mana Axe not only damages them but also limits their ability to fight back. At higher levels it can quickly deplete an enemy's mana pool while dealing a surprising amount of additional damage. The final upgrade also grants movement speed, making it a useful alternative to basic boots for some heroes.
strengths: Burns enemy mana on every attack
Deals pure damage based on mana burned
Effective against spellcasters and mana-heavy builds
Provides movement speed at maximum level
Can significantly reduce an enemy's ability to cast spells
weaknesses: Less effective against heroes with low mana pools
Provides little value once an enemy runs out of mana
Does not directly increase attack damage
Requires repeated attacks to maximize effectiveness
tips: Mana Axe becomes stronger against heroes with large mana pools.
Heroes with high attack speed gain more value because they trigger mana burn more frequently.
If an enemy has no mana remaining, Mana Axe can no longer deal additional mana burn damage.
The final upgrade provides movement speed, making Mana Axe a potential alternative to basic boots.
Consider Mana Axe when facing enemies that rely heavily on abilities.
Mana Axe is one of the strongest counters to Mana Shield builds.

bestHeroes.flameweaver: Already has multiple ways to drain enemy mana through his abilities. Combined with Mana Axe, he can rapidly empty an opponent's mana pool and leave them unable to cast important abilities.
bestHeroes.freezi: Her high attack speed lets her trigger Mana Axe repeatedly, burning large amounts of mana in a short period while continuously applying additional pure damage.
bestHeroes.volcarn: His illusions inherit the mana burn effect, allowing multiple attacks to drain mana simultaneously and overwhelm mana-dependent enemies very quickly.

faq.q: How do I unlock Mana Axe?
faq.a: Mana Axe is available from the beginning of the game. Like all Mystic items, it does not require hero progression to unlock.

faq.q: Does Mana Axe deal pure damage?
faq.a: Yes. The damage caused by Mana Axe ignores both Physical Armor and Magic Armor.

faq.q: Does Mana Axe work if the target has no mana?
faq.a: No. Mana Axe deals damage based on mana burned. If the target has no mana remaining, the item cannot burn additional mana.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Mana Axe?
faq.a: Flameweaver, Freezi, and Volcarn are among the strongest users because they can repeatedly trigger the mana burn effect.

faq.q: What item does Mana Axe counter?
faq.a: Mana Axe is one of the strongest counters to Mana Shield. Mana Shield builds rely on large amounts of mana to increase survivability — Mana Axe directly attacks this strength by burning mana while simultaneously dealing damage.

faq.q: Is Mana Axe a good alternative to Boots?
faq.a: For some heroes, yes. The final upgrade grants movement speed, allowing certain builds to gain mobility while also benefiting from mana burn and additional damage.

ManaAxe.description: Mana Axe is a Mystic item that specializes in mana burn. Instead of increasing attack damage directly, it burns mana from enemy heroes and deals pure damage based on the amount of mana removed. This makes Mana Axe one of the most effective anti-mage items in Spelltroum.

AxeOfVampire.whyUse: Axe of Vampire is designed for heroes that want powerful sustain during combat. Unlike traditional lifesteal items that provide a constant effect, Axe of Vampire grants access to temporary bursts of extremely strong healing. A well-timed Vampirism Rune can completely change the outcome of a fight, allowing a hero to recover large amounts of health while continuing to attack. The item also provides useful combat stats including bonus damage, physical armor, and movement speed at maximum level. Many players upgrade it early to gain access to the Vampirism Rune, then finish upgrading later when additional damage and armor become more valuable.
strengths: Provides bonus damage and physical armor
Provides movement speed at maximum level
Can generate powerful Vampirism Runes from bushes
Grants 100% Physical Lifesteal when a rune is activated
weaknesses: The lifesteal effect depends on finding a Vampirism Rune
Less effective on heroes that rely primarily on magic damage
Requires physical attacks to gain value from the rune
Some of its power comes from randomness
tips: The Vampirism Rune only appears after upgrading Axe of Vampire.
Save the Vampirism Rune for important fights whenever possible.
Heroes with high attack speed gain the most value from the lifesteal effect.
The item is often worth upgrading to Level 2 early to gain access to the Vampirism Rune.
Physical armor makes the item useful even when a Vampirism Rune is not available.

bestHeroes.druid: His abilities can create additional bushes during combat, providing more opportunities to discover Vampirism Runes. Since Furion primarily deals physical damage, he can make excellent use of the 100% lifesteal effect.
bestHeroes.freezi: His additional attack opportunities allow him to trigger multiple healing instances during the Vampirism Rune, helping him recover health extremely quickly during combat.
bestHeroes.grizzly: Benefits from the offensive stats and uses the Vampirism Rune to offset damage taken during aggressive engagements, allowing him to remain in combat longer.

faq.q: How do I unlock Axe of Vampire?
faq.a: Axe of Vampire is available from the beginning of the game. Like all Mystic items, it does not require hero progression to unlock.

faq.q: How do I get a Vampirism Rune?
faq.a: After upgrading Axe of Vampire, destroying bushes gives you a chance to discover a Vampirism Rune.

faq.q: What does the Vampirism Rune do?
faq.a: When activated, the rune grants 100% Physical Lifesteal for 5 seconds.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Axe of Vampire?
faq.a: Furion, Freezi, Mortifier, Grizzly, and Volcarn are among the strongest users because they can take full advantage of the temporary lifesteal effect.

faq.q: Is Axe of Vampire a reliable source of healing?
faq.a: Not completely. The healing depends on finding and activating a Vampirism Rune. However, when available, it can provide some of the strongest healing effects in the game.

faq.q: Should I fully upgrade Axe of Vampire immediately?
faq.a: Not always. Many players upgrade it early to unlock the Vampirism Rune and then finish upgrading it later when they need additional damage, armor, and movement speed.

AxeOfVampire.description: Axe of Vampire is a Mystic item that provides damage, physical armor, movement speed, and access to one of the strongest temporary sustain effects in Spelltroum. After upgrading, heroes gain a chance to discover a Vampirism Rune while destroying bushes — granting 100% Physical Lifesteal for 5 seconds.

Ring.whyUse: Ring is designed for heroes that rely on physical damage and frequent attacks. The item increases physical damage, grants physical armor, and provides permanent Physical Lifesteal. This allows heroes to recover health while fighting, making them much harder to eliminate during extended engagements. The armor bonus is particularly valuable because it improves the effectiveness of every point of healing received — taking less damage while simultaneously restoring health creates a powerful combination. Even the first upgrade can be impactful, as the bonus damage is often enough for some heroes to destroy bushes in a single attack.
strengths: Scales well with increasing physical damage.
Improves survivability without sacrificing offensive power.
weaknesses: Does not provide healing from attacking bushes.
Less effective on heroes that rely primarily on magic damage.
Requires consistent attacks to maximize value.
Provides less burst damage than pure offensive items.
tips: Ring only restores health from physical damage dealt to heroes and creeps.
The item becomes stronger as your physical damage increases.
Attack speed greatly increases the value of Ring.
Lifesteal and armor work exceptionally well together.
Ring is often strongest during long fights where multiple attacks can be landed.
Heroes with built-in sustain gain even more value from Ring.

bestHeroes.death-slayer: Death Slayer already has access to lifesteal through his abilities. Ring stacks with his existing sustain, allowing him to recover even more health during combat. The additional armor and damage further strengthen his ability to remain in fights.

faq.q: How do I unlock Ring?
faq.a: Ring is unlocked by upgrading Death Slayer.

faq.q: Does Ring heal when attacking bushes?
faq.a: No. Ring only restores health when dealing physical damage to heroes and creeps.

faq.q: Does Ring work with physical abilities?
faq.a: Yes. Any physical damage that benefits from lifesteal can contribute to healing.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Ring?
faq.a: Death Slayer, Freezi, Grizzly, Volcarn, and Spitfire are among the strongest users because they either attack quickly or deal high physical damage.

faq.q: Why is armor useful on a lifesteal item?
faq.a: Armor reduces incoming physical damage, allowing the health restored through lifesteal to become even more effective. The combination of armor and healing makes heroes significantly harder to defeat.

faq.q: Is Ring a defensive item or a damage item?
faq.a: Ring is both. It provides damage, armor, and lifesteal, making it one of the most balanced sustain items available for physical damage heroes.

Ring.description: Ring is a Legendary item unlocked by upgrading Death Slayer. It combines physical damage, physical armor, and permanent Physical Lifesteal, making it one of the strongest sustain items for physical damage heroes. Unlike temporary healing effects, Ring provides lifesteal at all times — whenever the hero deals physical damage to heroes or creeps, a portion of that damage is returned as health. The combination of damage, armor, and lifesteal makes Ring an excellent choice for heroes that want to stay in combat longer and gradually outlast their opponents.

WarlockStaff.whyUse: Warlock Staff is designed for players who want to maximize their gold income. Most items help heroes become stronger directly — Warlock Staff takes a different approach by helping heroes acquire gold more quickly, allowing them to purchase additional items sooner. The item is especially valuable for heroes that need time and resources to reach their full potential. Even if those heroes die while farming or scaling, Warlock Staff helps soften the economic setback. This creates an unusual risk-versus-reward playstyle: a player can focus heavily on farming and resource collection, knowing that deaths are less punishing than usual. However, dying still means losing crowns and giving opponents opportunities to take control of the match.
strengths: Provides damage, attack speed, and spell power.
Can be used effectively by almost any hero.
Helps heroes reach important item upgrades faster.
weaknesses: Encourages risky play.
Does not directly improve survivability.
Losing crowns can outweigh the bonus gold gained.
Provides less combat power than specialized offensive items.
Requires careful decision-making to use effectively.
tips: Warlock Staff rewards aggressive farming strategies.
Dying is still a disadvantage, even when bonus gold is awarded.
Focus on collecting resources and accelerating your item progression.

bestHeroes.druid: Volcarn is often vulnerable during early stages and typically requires several items before reaching his full potential. Warlock Staff helps accelerate this progression by reducing the economic impact of deaths and allowing him to continue scaling even when under pressure.

faq.q: How do I unlock Warlock Staff?
faq.a: Warlock Staff is unlocked through the Daily Rewards system. Simply log in and claim daily rewards to unlock the item.

faq.q: How does Warlock Staff work?
faq.a: Whenever your hero dies, Warlock Staff grants bonus gold. This helps reduce the economic impact of being defeated.

faq.q: Is Warlock Staff a good item for beginners?
faq.a: It can be, but players should be careful. The item rewards deaths with gold, but dying too often can still cause you to lose the match.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Warlock Staff?
faq.a: Druid and Volcarn are among the most common users because they often benefit from additional farming and scaling opportunities.

faq.q: Does Warlock Staff mean I should intentionally die?
faq.a: Not usually. The goal is not to die as often as possible. Instead, the item allows you to take calculated risks and recover more easily when deaths happen.

faq.q: Why do some players consider Warlock Staff underrated?
faq.a: Many players focus only on combat power. Warlock Staff provides economic power instead, allowing skilled players to build item advantages that can become extremely valuable later in the match.

WarlockStaff.description: Warlock Staff is one of the most unusual items in Spelltroum. Instead of rewarding players for staying alive, it rewards them for dying. Whenever the owner is defeated, they receive bonus gold — creating entirely new strategies impossible with most other items. In addition to its unique passive, Warlock Staff provides a balanced mix of damage, attack speed, and spell power, making it usable on almost any hero.

Mana is often the most important resource for spellcasters — by restoring mana through farming and combat, Glacium Reaver allows heroes to continue using abilities without running out of resources. The item also provides Spell Power, increasing the effectiveness of magical abilities. Its unique bouncing magical projectile adds additional utility: it can damage multiple targets, clear bushes more efficiently, and create extra pressure during combat. At maximum level, the movement speed bonus can serve as an alternative to basic boots for heroes that want mobility without dedicating an entire item slot to movement.

GlaciumReaver.description: Glacium Reaver is a Mystic item designed for mana-dependent heroes. It provides Spell Power, movement speed, mana restoration, and a unique magical projectile effect that helps both farming and combat. Whenever the owner destroys bushes, creeps, or enemy heroes, Glacium Reaver restores mana — allowing spellcasters to remain active for longer periods. The item also grants a chance to launch a magical axe that converts the attack into Magic Damage and bounces to an additional target.

Unlike items that focus on increasing the frequency of critical hits, Claws of Ferocity focuses on increasing their impact — every successful critical strike becomes considerably stronger. The item also provides bonus health, making it surprisingly durable for an offensive item. Many players combine Claws of Ferocity with Lethal Claws, creating one of the strongest critical strike combinations in the game by increasing both critical strike chance and critical strike damage.

faq.q: How do I unlock Claws of Ferocity?

ClawsOfFerocity.description: Claws of Ferocity is a Mystic item focused on critical strikes. It provides bonus health, critical strike chance, and increases the damage dealt by critical hits. By default, critical strikes in Spelltroum deal 50% additional physical damage — Claws of Ferocity increases this bonus to 75%, making every critical hit significantly more dangerous.

While these builds can be powerful, they often leave heroes vulnerable during team fights. Cuirass solves this problem by providing a large increase to maximum health. The item is particularly valuable because health benefits every hero regardless of their playstyle. Whether you are a fighter, tank, assassin, or mage, staying alive longer allows you to deal more damage and have a greater impact on battles. In addition to bonus health, higher levels of Cuirass improve health regeneration and reduce the time required before regeneration begins after taking damage.

faq.a: If you are struggling to survive team fights or frequently get defeated before using your abilities, upgrading Cuirass is often a good investment.

The item dramatically reduces incoming magic damage, allowing heroes to survive abilities that would otherwise be devastating. The reflection effect is especially powerful against lifesteal builds, since reflected Pure Damage immediately offsets the health enemies recover. Because reflected damage scales with incoming damage, Titan's Helmet often becomes more threatening the harder enemies hit. Unlike many defensive items, it also grants Spell Power, ensuring heroes don't completely sacrifice offensive potential.

If you are unable to secure kills, much of the item's value is lost. Players who prefer passive farming may find better results with other items.

However, the item provides little value if you are unable to secure kills — players who struggle to finish targets may find more reliable results from traditional health items.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Stunning Hammer?
faq.a: Freezi, Spitfire, and Volcarn are among the strongest users because their high attack speed gives them more opportunities to trigger the stun effect.

faq.q: When should I upgrade Stunning Hammer?
faq.a: Many players upgrade it to Level 2 early to unlock the stun effect, then finish upgrading it later when they need a higher stun chance.

faq.q: Is Stunning Hammer a damage item?
faq.a: Not primarily. Stunning Hammer is mainly a utility and control item that provides health and crowd control rather than direct damage.

ReapersEmbrace.description: Reaper's Embrace is a Mystic item that combines offensive power, survivability, and sustain. It grants Physical Lifesteal, Spell Lifesteal, Magic Resistance, and a unique chance to launch a spectral scythe that damages everything in its path. Unlike most lifesteal items that only benefit physical attackers, Reaper's Embrace can restore health from both physical and magical damage — making it one of the most versatile sustain items in Spelltroum.
ReapersEmbrace.whyUse: Reaper's Embrace is designed for heroes that want both offensive power and survivability. The item provides lifesteal from both physical and magical damage, allowing heroes to recover health through almost every form of combat. One of its biggest advantages is that the lifesteal effect becomes available from the very first upgrade, letting players buy it early for sustain and upgrade it later when Magic Resistance becomes more valuable. The spectral scythe adds even more sustain potential — it travels in a straight line and damages every target it passes through, generating significant healing when several enemies or creeps are lined up together. Note that lifesteal only works against heroes and creeps, not bushes.
strengths: Provides both Physical and Spell Lifesteal.
Available sustain from the first upgrade.
Unique spectral scythe projectile that pierces multiple targets.
Effective on both physical and magical heroes.
Excellent hybrid offensive and defensive item.
weaknesses: The scythe effect is chance-based.
Provides less raw damage than dedicated offensive items.
Less effective on heroes that rarely deal damage.
Requires active combat to fully benefit from the lifesteal.
Lifesteal does not work when attacking bushes.

s Embrace restores health from both physical and magical damage.",

faq.q: Does the spectral scythe stop after hitting an enemy?
faq.a: No. The spectral scythe travels in a straight line and damages every target it passes through.

BootsOfSpeed.whyUse: Vital Boots are designed for heroes that value mobility and survivability. Movement speed is one of the most important stats in Spelltroum — faster heroes farm more efficiently, rotate between fights more quickly, and control engagements more effectively. The Healing Potion mechanic adds another layer of value: even a single potion can completely change the outcome of a fight. One of the biggest advantages is that the potion-finding effect becomes available from the first upgrade, letting players start collecting potions early and finish upgrading the item later.
strengths: Provides the highest movement speed bonus in the game.
Chance to find Healing Potions while destroying bushes.
Useful throughout all stages of the match.
weaknesses: Relies partially on finding potions.
Provides less direct damage than offensive items.
Less valuable on heroes that do not benefit heavily from mobility.
Potion generation is chance-based.
tips: The potion-finding effect becomes available from the first upgrade.
Save Healing Potions for important fights whenever possible.
Movement speed improves both farming and combat performance.
Heroes with large health pools gain extra value from Healing Potions.
Vital Boots can provide surprising survivability during long matches.
Carrying an additional potion can sometimes decide a close fight.

faq.q: How do I unlock Vital Boots?
faq.a: Vital Boots are available from the beginning of the game. Like all Mystic items, they do not require hero progression to unlock.

faq.q: What do Vital Boots do?
faq.a: Vital Boots increase movement speed, provide Physical Armor, and allow heroes to find and carry additional Healing Potions.

faq.q: Can I find Healing Potions immediately after buying Vital Boots?
faq.a: Yes. The potion-finding effect becomes available from the first upgrade.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Vital Boots?
faq.a: Druid, Death Slayer, and Grizzly are among the strongest users because they benefit greatly from both mobility and survivability.

faq.q: Why are Vital Boots considered a strong utility item?
faq.a: They combine movement speed, Physical Armor, healing, and additional potion storage in a single item, making them useful in a wide variety of situations.

faq.q: Are Vital Boots only useful for melee heroes?
faq.a: No. Any hero that values mobility and sustain can benefit from Vital Boots, although melee heroes often gain the most noticeable advantage.

BootsOfSpeed.description: Vital Boots are a Mystic item that provides the highest movement speed bonus in the game while also offering powerful healing utility. In addition to speed, Vital Boots give heroes a chance to discover Healing Potions while destroying bushes — potions that can be stored and activated later to restore health when it matters most. At higher levels, the item also increases the number of potions a hero can carry.

BootsOfRegen.description: Regen Boots are a Mystic item that combines high movement speed with powerful health regeneration effects. What makes them unique is their ability to automatically trigger health regeneration after taking a large hit — if a single attack deals more than a certain percentage of the hero's maximum health, the item activates and immediately starts regeneration. Regen Boots also reduce the normal regeneration delay, allowing heroes to recover more quickly after taking damage.
BootsOfRegen.whyUse: Regen Boots are designed for heroes that rely on mobility and hit-and-run gameplay. Most heroes must wait 10 seconds after taking damage before natural health regeneration begins — Regen Boots reduce this delay while also providing a way to trigger regeneration instantly after receiving a powerful attack. This creates a unique playstyle where heroes can engage, take damage, retreat, and quickly recover before returning to the fight. The item is particularly effective on heroes with smaller health pools, as they trigger the regeneration effect more consistently. However, Regen Boots are highly situational and their value depends heavily on the enemy team composition.
strengths: Can trigger regeneration after taking heavy damage.
weaknesses: Less effective on heroes with very large health pools (e.g. Grizzly).
Vulnerable to damage-over-time effects like Fire Axe burn or Viverna poison.
Requires disengaging to fully benefit from regeneration.
Situational compared to more consistent defensive items.
tips: Regen Boots are strongest on heroes with smaller health pools.
The movement speed bonus helps create opportunities to retreat and recover.
The item excels in hit-and-run playstyles.
Avoid prolonged fights against heroes that apply damage over time.
Consider Regen Boots when facing high burst damage heroes.
Regeneration is much easier to maintain when enemies cannot continuously damage you.

faq.q: How do I unlock Regen Boots?
faq.a: Regen Boots are available from the beginning of the game. Like all Mystic items, they do not require hero progression to unlock.

faq.q: What makes Regen Boots unique?
faq.a: Regen Boots can automatically trigger health regeneration after the hero takes a sufficiently large hit.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Regen Boots?
faq.a: Viverna and Druid are among the strongest users because they can quickly retreat, recover health, and return to the fight.

ManaBoots.whyUse: Mana Boots are designed for heroes that frequently run out of mana. Running out of mana at the wrong moment can completely change the outcome of a battle — Mana Boots help solve this by providing a steady source of mana recovery through potions found while farming bushes. Unlike pure mana items, Mana Boots also provide excellent mobility, allowing heroes to maintain both their mana reserves and their positioning throughout the match. Because the Mana Potion effect becomes available from the first upgrade, many players purchase Mana Boots early and immediately start collecting additional mana resources.
strengths: Chance to find Mana Potions while destroying bushes.
Increases maximum mana at higher levels.
Strong utility item for ability-based heroes.
weaknesses: Provides no direct damage.
Less useful for heroes that rarely use mana.
Relies partially on finding Mana Potions.
Offers no defensive stats such as armor or health.
tips: Mana Potions can be saved for important fights.
The potion-finding effect becomes available from the first upgrade.
Heroes that destroy many bushes generally gain the most value from Mana Boots.
Movement speed helps both farming and combat performance.
Mana Boots are often strongest on heroes that rely heavily on abilities.
The additional mana at maximum level can allow some heroes to cast extra abilities during fights.

faq.q: How do I unlock Mana Boots?
faq.a: Mana Boots are available from the beginning of the game as a Common item.

faq.q: What do Mana Boots do?
faq.a: Mana Boots increase movement speed, allow heroes to find Mana Potions while destroying bushes, increase potion storage capacity, and provide additional maximum mana at higher levels.

faq.q: Can I find Mana Potions immediately after buying Mana Boots?
faq.a: Yes. The Mana Potion effect becomes available from the first upgrade.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Mana Boots?
faq.a: Flameweaver, Shadow Fury, Faerie, and Viverna are among the strongest users because they frequently rely on mana and abilities.

faq.q: Why are Mana Boots good for mages?
faq.a: Mages often consume large amounts of mana during combat. Mana Boots help them maintain their resources while also providing valuable mobility.

faq.q: Are Mana Boots only useful for mages?
faq.a: No. Any hero that frequently uses abilities and needs additional mana sustain can benefit from Mana Boots.

ManaBoots.description: Mana Boots are a Common item that provides movement speed and powerful mana sustain. Their unique effect allows heroes to discover Mana Potions while destroying bushes — potions that can be stored and activated later to instantly restore mana when needed. At higher levels, Mana Boots also increase the number of potions a hero can carry and provide additional maximum mana, making them one of the strongest utility items for mana-dependent heroes.

BlinkBoots.whyUse: Blink Boots are designed for heroes that rely on positioning. The ability to instantly blink gives players access to opportunities that would otherwise be impossible — a well-timed Blink can secure a kill, escape an ambush, dodge dangerous abilities, or quickly reposition during combat. Unlike many utility items, Blink Boots also increase Critical Strike Chance, which stacks with other sources of critical strikes and fits naturally into many offensive builds. The Blink Rune effect becomes available from the first upgrade, and later upgrades increase the number of runes that can be carried.
strengths: Chance to find Blink Runes while destroying bushes.
Effective throughout all stages of the match.
weaknesses: Relies partially on finding Blink Runes.
Provides less survivability than defensive boots.
Requires good positioning to maximize value.
Critical Strike Chance is less valuable for heroes that do not rely on physical damage.
tips: Blink Runes become available from the first upgrade.
Save Blink Runes for important fights whenever possible.
Blink can be used both offensively and defensively.
Critical Strike Chance stacks with other critical strike items and abilities.
Fast farming heroes often gain additional value by using Blink Runes to move between objectives.
Positioning is often more valuable than raw damage.

faq.q: How do I unlock Blink Boots?
faq.a: Blink Boots are available from the beginning of the game. Like all Mystic items, they do not require hero progression to unlock.

faq.q: What do Blink Boots do?
faq.a: Blink Boots increase movement speed, allow heroes to find Blink Runes while destroying bushes, increase Blink Rune storage capacity, and provide Critical Strike Chance.

faq.q: Can I find Blink Runes immediately after buying Blink Boots?
faq.a: Yes. The Blink Rune effect becomes available from the first upgrade.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Blink Boots?
faq.a: Death Slayer, Volcarn, Mortifier, and Shadow Fury are among the strongest users because they benefit from both mobility and Critical Strike Chance.

faq.q: Do Blink Boots work well with critical strike builds?
faq.a: Yes. Blink Boots provide Critical Strike Chance, which stacks with other critical strike items and hero abilities.

faq.q: Are Blink Boots only useful for assassins?
faq.a: No. While assassins benefit greatly, any hero that values mobility, positioning, or critical strikes can make effective use of the item.

BlinkBoots.description: Blink Boots are a Mystic item designed for aggressive heroes, assassins, and players who value mobility. Their unique effect allows heroes to discover Blink Runes while destroying bushes — runes that grant a Blink ability to instantly teleport a short distance. At higher levels, Blink Boots allow heroes to carry an additional Blink Rune and provide Critical Strike Chance, making them one of the most offensive boot options in the game.

FireBook.whyUse: Fire Grimoire is designed for players who want to maximize the power of their abilities. Because it provides the largest Spell Power bonus in the game, it often delivers a larger increase to ability effectiveness than any other item. While many players associate Spell Power primarily with mages, Fire Grimoire can also be valuable on heroes whose abilities provide utility, shields, summons, or other special effects. The item is especially powerful when multiple abilities benefit from Spell Power scaling.

Improves all Spell Power scaling abilities.
Increases both offensive and defensive ability effects.

Provides no armor or resistances.
Provides no movement speed.

faq.q: How do I unlock Fire Grimoire?
faq.a: Fire Grimoire is available from the beginning of the game as a Common item.

faq.q: What does Fire Grimoire do?
faq.a: Fire Grimoire provides the highest Spell Power bonus available in Spelltroum.

faq.q: What is Spell Power?
faq.a: Spell Power improves the effectiveness of hero abilities. Depending on the ability, it may increase damage, shields, summons, healing, or other special effects.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Fire Grimoire?
faq.a: Spiritmonger, Viverna, Faerie, Shadow Fury, and Druid are among the strongest users because multiple abilities in their kits benefit from Spell Power.

faq.q: Is Fire Grimoire only for mages?
faq.a: No. Any hero whose abilities scale well with Spell Power can benefit from Fire Grimoire, including heroes that deal physical damage or rely on summons and defensive abilities.

FireBook.description: Fire Grimoire is a Common item that provides the highest Spell Power bonus in Spelltroum. Unlike many items that combine multiple stats, Fire Grimoire focuses entirely on increasing Spell Power — making it one of the strongest offensive items for heroes that rely on abilities to deal damage, control enemies, summon units, or strengthen defensive effects. Spell Power improves all hero abilities, including Basic Abilities, Ultimate Abilities, and some effects tied to a hero's primary attack.

WaterBook.whyUse: Water Grimoire is designed for heroes that need large amounts of mana. The item provides three valuable benefits: increased maximum mana, increased mana regeneration, and Cooldown Reduction. Together, these bonuses allow heroes to cast abilities more often and remain effective during long fights. Water Grimoire also works exceptionally well with Mana Shield. Since Mana Shield converts part of incoming damage into mana loss, increasing your mana pool effectively increases your survivability — the larger your mana reserve, the more damage Mana Shield can absorb before your health becomes vulnerable. Because Water Grimoire provides no health or defensive stats, fully upgrading it early can sometimes be risky. Many players purchase a few levels first and finish upgrading it later after acquiring additional survivability.

faq.q: How do I unlock Water Grimoire?
faq.a: Water Grimoire is available from the beginning of the game. Like all Mystic items, it does not require hero progression to unlock.

faq.q: What does Water Grimoire do?
faq.a: Water Grimoire increases maximum mana, improves mana regeneration, and reduces ability cooldowns at maximum level.

faq.q: Why does Water Grimoire work well with Mana Shield?
faq.a: Mana Shield absorbs damage using mana. A larger mana pool allows Mana Shield to absorb more damage before your health starts dropping.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Water Grimoire?
faq.a: Flameweaver, Spitfire, Viverna, and Faerie are among the strongest users because they rely heavily on mana and frequent ability usage.

faq.q: Does Water Grimoire increase damage?
faq.a: Not directly. However, the additional mana and cooldown reduction allow heroes to cast abilities more often, which can significantly increase their overall damage output.

faq.q: Should I fully upgrade Water Grimoire early?
faq.a: Usually not. Because the item provides no health or defensive stats, many players prefer to gain some survivability first and complete Water Grimoire later.

WaterBook.description: Water Grimoire is a Mystic item that provides a large Mana Pool, strong Mana Regeneration, and Cooldown Reduction. Unlike Fire Grimoire, which focuses entirely on increasing Spell Power, Water Grimoire is designed for heroes that rely on casting abilities frequently throughout a match. At maximum level, Water Grimoire also reduces ability cooldowns, making it one of the best items for heroes that depend heavily on their abilities.

GeoBook.whyUse: Geo Grimoire is designed for heroes that rely on stuns and crowd control. A longer stun duration means enemies spend more time unable to move, attack, or cast abilities — giving your team more opportunities to deal damage, escape danger, or secure important kills. The bonus Health also makes the wielder more durable, helping them survive while applying crowd control. Unlike damage-focused Grimoires, Geo Grimoire rewards strategic gameplay and can have a massive impact even when it contributes little direct damage.

Situational compared to more universally useful items.

Longer stuns often provide more value than additional damage.
Geo Grimoire is strongest on heroes that already have crowd control abilities.
Bonus Health makes the item useful even when the control effect is not needed.
Coordinate with teammates to maximize the value of longer stuns.

faq.q: How do I unlock Geo Grimoire?
faq.a: Geo Grimoire is unlocked by upgrading Freezi.

faq.q: What does Geo Grimoire do?
faq.a: Geo Grimoire increases the duration of stun effects applied by hero abilities and provides bonus Health.

faq.q: Does Geo Grimoire work with Stunning Hammer?
faq.a: No. Geo Grimoire only affects hero abilities. Item-based stuns such as Stunning Hammer are not affected.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Geo Grimoire?
faq.a: Freezi, Spiritmonger, Death Slayer, Spitfire, and Faerie are among the strongest users because they can apply additional crowd control through their abilities.

faq.q: Does Geo Grimoire increase damage?
faq.a: Not directly. Its primary purpose is to improve crowd control and survivability.

GeoBook.description: Geo Grimoire is a Legendary item unlocked by upgrading Freezi. The item provides bonus Health and a unique effect that increases the duration of crowd control abilities. Unlike most offensive items, Geo Grimoire focuses on control rather than damage, allowing heroes to keep enemies disabled for longer periods of time. The bonus duration only affects hero abilities and does not affect item-based stuns such as Stunning Hammer.

Scepter.whyUse: Scepter is designed for heroes that rely on magical abilities to deal damage. The item increases Spell Power, improving ability scaling, while also providing Mana Regeneration to support frequent spell usage. Its most valuable effect is Magic Critical Strike Chance — when a magical ability critically strikes, it can dramatically increase burst damage and help secure kills that would otherwise be missed. For heroes with multiple damaging abilities, Scepter can provide a significant increase in overall damage output. However, Scepter is only effective if the hero actually deals magical damage. Heroes that primarily deal physical or pure damage often gain very little value from the item's critical strike effect.
strengths: Effective throughout all stages of the match.
weaknesses: Less Spell Power than Fire Grimoire.
Magic Critical Strikes only affect magical damage.
Provides no health.
Provides no armor or resistances.
Weak on physical and pure damage heroes.

Scepter is strongest on heroes with multiple damaging magical abilities.

faq.q: How do I unlock Scepter?
faq.a: Scepter is available from the beginning of the game. Like all Mystic items, it does not require hero progression to unlock.

faq.q: What does Scepter do?
faq.a: Scepter provides Spell Power, Mana Regeneration, and Magic Critical Strike Chance.

faq.q: What is a Magic Critical Strike?
faq.a: A Magic Critical Strike increases magical damage by 50%. For example, an ability that normally deals 100 damage will deal 150 damage when it critically strikes.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Scepter?
faq.a: Viverna, Faerie, and Spiritmonger are among the strongest users because multiple abilities in their kits deal magical damage.

faq.q: Does Scepter work on Shadow Fury?
faq.a: Not effectively. Shadow Fury primarily deals physical damage, so she gains very little value from the Magic Critical Strike effect.

faq.q: Is Scepter useful on every hero?
faq.a: No. Scepter is most effective on heroes that deal significant magical damage. Heroes that rely on physical or pure damage usually have stronger alternatives.

Scepter.description: Scepter is a Mystic item that combines Spell Power, Mana Regeneration, and Magic Critical Strike Chance. Unlike Fire Grimoire, which focuses entirely on increasing Spell Power, Scepter provides a smaller Spell Power bonus in exchange for a unique offensive effect: the ability for magical damage to critically strike. A Magic Critical Strike deals 50% additional damage — for example, an ability that normally deals 100 damage will deal 150 damage when a Magic Critical Strike occurs.

MageStaff.whyUse: Mage Staff is designed for heroes that deal magical damage consistently throughout a match. The item increases Spell Power, allowing abilities to deal more damage or gain stronger scaling effects. It also increases maximum Mana, helping heroes cast more abilities during fights. Its most important effect is Magic Lifesteal — whenever the hero deals magical damage to enemy heroes or creeps, a portion of that damage is converted into health. This allows spellcasters to stay healthy while farming, fighting, and clearing objectives without relying entirely on healing items or natural regeneration. However, like all lifesteal effects in Spelltroum, Magic Lifesteal does not work against bushes.
strengths: Effective during both farming and combat.
weaknesses: Magic Lifesteal does not work on bushes.

Requires magical damage to fully utilize the item's power.

faq.q: How do I unlock Mage Staff?
faq.a: Mage Staff is unlocked by upgrading Spiritmonger.

faq.q: What does Mage Staff do?
faq.a: Mage Staff provides Spell Power, additional Mana, and Magic Lifesteal.

faq.q: What is Magic Lifesteal?
faq.a: Magic Lifesteal converts a portion of magical damage dealt to enemy heroes and creeps into health.

faq.q: Does Magic Lifesteal work on bushes?
faq.a: No. Like all lifesteal effects in Spelltroum, Magic Lifesteal only works against enemy heroes and creeps.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Mage Staff?
faq.a: Spiritmonger, Viverna, and Faerie are among the strongest users because they deal consistent magical damage and can trigger Magic Lifesteal frequently.

faq.q: Is Mage Staff good on Shadow Fury?
faq.a: No. Shadow Fury primarily deals Physical Damage, so Magic Lifesteal does not work with her abilities. Other physical damage items are generally much more effective.

faq.q: Is Mage Staff useful on physical damage heroes?
faq.a: Usually not. Mage Staff is designed for heroes that deal Magical Damage. Physical damage heroes cannot fully utilize the Magic Lifesteal effect, which is the item's primary strength.

MageStaff.description: Mage Staff is a Legendary item unlocked by upgrading Spiritmonger. The item provides Spell Power, additional Mana, and one of the most valuable effects for spellcasters: Magic Lifesteal. Unlike physical lifesteal items, Mage Staff allows heroes to restore health through magical damage, making it an excellent choice for heroes that rely on abilities as their primary source of damage.

WitchBlade.description: Witch Blade is a Common item unlocked through Daily Rewards. It is designed for heroes that rely on magical abilities and frequent spell usage, providing Mana Regeneration, Spell Power, and a unique effect that reduces an enemy's Magic Resistance. Unlike many offensive items that only increase your own damage, Witch Blade also increases the damage dealt by your teammates, making it especially valuable in team-based strategies and magic-focused compositions.
WitchBlade.whyUse: Witch Blade is one of the best utility items for magical heroes. The first upgrade immediately grants Mana Regeneration, allowing heroes to use abilities more frequently during the early game. The second upgrade provides Spell Power, increasing the effectiveness of abilities. Its most important effect is Magic Resistance Reduction — when Witch Blade affects an enemy, it applies a debuff that lowers the target's Magic Resistance, causing all magical damage dealt to that enemy to become stronger, regardless of which hero deals the damage. Because of this, Witch Blade becomes especially powerful when multiple heroes on a team deal magical damage.

Provides no Armor.
Less effective for physical damage heroes.
Provides limited value if your team deals little magical damage.

The second upgrade grants Spell Power.
Magic Resistance Reduction benefits both you and your teammates.
Witch Blade is strongest against enemies being focused by multiple magical heroes.
The item is useful throughout both the early and late game.
Consider prioritizing Witch Blade when your team deals mostly magical damage.

faq.q: How do I unlock Witch Blade?
faq.a: Witch Blade is unlocked through Daily Rewards.

faq.q: Does Witch Blade help my teammates?
faq.a: Yes. The Magic Resistance Reduction is applied to the enemy, meaning all allied magical damage becomes stronger against that target.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Witch Blade?
faq.a: Viverna, Faerie, Spiritmonger, and other magical damage dealers are among the strongest users of the item.

RingOfRegen.whyUse: Regeneration Ring is designed for heroes that want to cast abilities frequently, harass enemies, and disengage before returning to the fight. The item provides powerful Mana Regeneration, allowing heroes to use abilities more often without running out of mana. It also reduces ability cooldowns, making spells available more frequently throughout the match. One of its strongest defensive effects is reducing the delay before Health Regeneration begins. Normally, heroes must wait several seconds after taking damage before regeneration starts. Regeneration Ring dramatically shortens this delay, allowing heroes to recover much faster between engagements. The additional Magic Resistance also helps protect against burst damage from enemy spellcasters.
strengths: Can transform melee heroes into ranged attackers
weaknesses: Provides no direct damage bonus
Provides less raw survivability than dedicated defensive items
Requires good positioning to fully utilize the additional range
Less valuable on heroes that rarely use abilities
