Use the faster regeneration timing to take short trades and recover quickly.
Cooldown Reduction becomes more valuable on heroes with powerful abilities.
The item is especially effective on mobile heroes that can disengage after attacking.
Combining multiple regeneration-focused items can create powerful sustain builds.
Magic Resistance helps protect against enemy spellcasters.

bestHeroes.spitfire: Regeneration Ring is one of the strongest Legendary items for Spitfire. The Mana Regeneration and Cooldown Reduction allow him to use his Fireball abilities much more frequently. The increased attack range also improves his ability to pressure enemies from a safe distance while maintaining constant ability usage.
bestHeroes.mortifier: Regeneration Ring creates a unique playstyle for Mortifier. As a melee hero, he gains ranged attacks from the item, allowing him to fight in ways that are normally unavailable to him. The Mana Regeneration and Cooldown Reduction also help him place bombs more frequently and make greater use of his abilities throughout a match.
bestHeroes.faerie: Faerie benefits greatly from Regeneration Ring. The item allows her to cast abilities more often, maintain pressure during fights, and recover health more quickly after disengaging. Because Faerie often relies on mobility and positioning, the faster regeneration cycle can be extremely valuable.

faq.q: How do I unlock Regeneration Ring?
faq.a: Regeneration Ring is unlocked by upgrading Spitfire.

faq.q: What does Regeneration Ring do?
faq.a: Regeneration Ring increases attack range, provides Mana Regeneration, reduces cooldowns, grants Magic Resistance, and reduces the delay before Health Regeneration begins.

faq.q: Does Regeneration Ring turn melee heroes into ranged heroes?
faq.a: Yes. The bonus attack range allows melee heroes to attack from range, creating a very different playstyle.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Regeneration Ring?
faq.a: Spitfire, Mortifier, and Faerie are among the strongest users because they benefit from the Mana Regeneration, Cooldown Reduction, and unique range bonus.

faq.q: Does Regeneration Ring stack with other regeneration items?
faq.a: Yes. It works particularly well with Cuirass and Regen Boots because all of them reduce the delay before Health Regeneration begins.

faq.q: Is Regeneration Ring good against mages?
faq.a: Yes. The item provides Magic Resistance, helping reduce incoming magical damage while also allowing faster recovery between fights.

RingOfRegen.description: Regeneration Ring is a Legendary item unlocked by upgrading Spitfire. This item dramatically changes how some heroes are played. Its most unique effect is the bonus Attack Range it provides. Melee heroes become ranged attackers, while ranged heroes gain additional attack range. Because of this, Regeneration Ring can completely transform a hero's playstyle and open up strategies that would otherwise be impossible. In addition to increased attack range, the item provides Mana Regeneration, Cooldown Reduction, Magic Resistance, and significantly reduces the time required for Health Regeneration to begin after taking damage.

HiddenFighterStaff.whyUse: Shuriken is one of the most flexible utility items in Spelltroum. The first upgrade already provides Mana and Cooldown Reduction, making it valuable even before investing further upgrades. This is particularly useful for heroes that already have cooldown reduction from other items. Even a single level of Shuriken can noticeably improve ability uptime. Its signature effect gives attacks a chance to become a bouncing Shuriken projectile. The projectile deals Physical Damage, bounces once, and can strike additional bushes or enemies. This improves farming speed and occasionally creates unexpected damage opportunities during fights. Since the projectile deals Physical Damage, it benefits from Physical Critical Strikes and physical damage bonuses.
strengths: Bouncing projectiles can damage multiple targets
weaknesses: Relies partially on chance-based effects
Provides no Health
Provides no Armor or Magic Resistance
Less valuable on heroes that rarely attack
Requires Attack Speed to maximize effectiveness
tips: The first upgrade already provides Mana and Cooldown Reduction.
Physical Critical Strikes affect Shuriken projectiles.
Physical damage bonuses increase Shuriken damage.
The item is strongest on heroes with high Attack Speed.
Bouncing attacks significantly improve farming efficiency.
Combining Shuriken with other cooldown reduction items creates powerful ability-focused builds.

bestHeroes.stonewarden: Shuriken works extremely well on Stonewarden. The additional Attack Speed helps him attack more frequently, while Cooldown Reduction allows him to use abilities more often. His naturally high damage makes every Shuriken bounce more threatening, and the item significantly improves his farming speed.
bestHeroes.spitfire: Spitfire benefits from nearly every stat provided by Shuriken. Attack Speed increases the frequency of Shuriken procs, while Mana and Cooldown Reduction allow him to cast abilities more often. The bouncing projectiles also help him clear bushes faster and accelerate his farming.
bestHeroes.freezi: Freezi is another excellent user of Shuriken. Her high Attack Speed allows her to trigger the effect frequently. The bouncing projectiles help her farm more efficiently while also creating additional pressure during fights. The Cooldown Reduction also gives her more opportunities to use her abilities throughout the match.
bestHeroes.death-slayer: Shuriken can enable interesting cooldown-focused builds for Death Slayer. The Cooldown Reduction stacks well with other cooldown reduction items, allowing him to cast his stun significantly more often. Players focused on maximizing crowd control can use Shuriken as part of a control-oriented build.

faq.q: How do I unlock Shuriken?
faq.a: Shuriken is available from the beginning of the game as a Common item.

faq.q: What does Shuriken do?
faq.a: Shuriken provides Attack Speed, Mana, Spell Power, Cooldown Reduction, and grants a chance for attacks to become bouncing Physical Damage projectiles.

faq.q: Does the Shuriken deal Physical or Magical Damage?
faq.a: The Shuriken deals Physical Damage.

faq.q: Can Shuriken critically strike?
faq.a: Yes. Because the projectile deals Physical Damage, Physical Critical Strike effects can apply to it.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Shuriken?
faq.a: Stonewarden, Spitfire, Freezi, and certain Death Slayer builds are among the strongest users because they benefit from Attack Speed and Cooldown Reduction.

faq.q: Is Shuriken good for farming?
faq.a: Yes. The bouncing projectile can hit additional bushes and targets, making farming significantly more efficient.

faq.q: Is Shuriken useful for cooldown reduction builds?
faq.a: Yes. Even the first upgrade provides Cooldown Reduction, making it an effective addition to heroes that want to cast abilities more frequently.

HiddenFighterStaff.description: Shuriken is a Common item available from the beginning of the game. The item provides Attack Speed, Cooldown Reduction, Spell Power, and Mana. Its unique effect gives attacks a chance to transform into a bouncing Shuriken projectile. Whenever this effect triggers, the attack becomes a Physical Damage projectile that bounces once to another target. This allows heroes to farm bushes more efficiently, damage multiple enemies, and benefit from Physical Critical Strikes and other physical damage bonuses. Because it combines Attack Speed and Cooldown Reduction, Shuriken is useful for both attack-focused and ability-focused heroes.

BladesOfCriticalHit.whyUse: Critical Blades is designed for heroes that want to maximize the damage of their critical strikes. The item provides a small amount of Critical Strike Chance, but its primary strength comes from increasing the maximum Critical Damage bonus. This means that whenever a critical strike occurs, it deals substantially more damage than a normal critical strike. The item also provides Spell Power, making it useful for heroes whose abilities scale with Spell Power while still relying on physical damage. For some heroes, Critical Blades can dramatically increase burst damage and create opportunities to eliminate enemies before they can react.
strengths: Strong synergy with critical strike builds
Effective on multiple physical damage heroes
weaknesses: Relies on Critical Strike Chance to reach maximum value
Provides no Health
Provides no Armor or Magic Resistance
Less effective on heroes that rarely deal physical damage
Requires other critical strike sources to fully maximize its potential
tips: Critical Blades are strongest when combined with other sources of Critical Strike Chance.
Increasing Critical Strike Chance increases the value of the item's Critical Damage bonus.
Physical damage heroes benefit the most.
The item combines both Spell Power and critical strike scaling.
Burst damage builds gain exceptional value from Critical Blades.
The item is especially dangerous on heroes capable of landing high-damage attacks.

bestHeroes.shadow-fury: Critical Blades is one of the signature items for Shadow Fury. Spell Power improves her abilities, including her charged attack. The additional Critical Strike Chance increases the likelihood of landing devastating critical hits. Most importantly, the increased Critical Damage multiplier allows her charged attacks to deal significantly more damage, making one-shot eliminations much more realistic.
bestHeroes.spiritmonger: Spiritmonger gains surprising value from Critical Blades. Her Soul Collection ability deals physical damage, allowing it to benefit from the increased Critical Damage multiplier. The Spell Power bonus also improves her abilities, allowing her to collect more souls while increasing her overall damage potential.
bestHeroes.death-slayer: Critical Blades can be effective on Death Slayer, especially in damage-oriented builds. Death Slayer already has access to Critical Strike mechanics through his abilities. The additional Critical Strike Chance and increased Critical Damage multiplier significantly improve the damage of successful critical hits. The Spell Power bonus also improves several parts of his kit, making the item useful even outside of its critical strike effects.

faq.q: How do I unlock Critical Blades?
faq.a: Critical Blades are unlocked by upgrading Shadow Fury.

faq.q: What do Critical Blades do?
faq.a: Critical Blades provide Spell Power, Physical Critical Strike Chance, and increase the maximum Critical Damage bonus.

faq.q: How much extra damage do Critical Strikes deal with Critical Blades?
faq.a: Normally, critical strikes deal 50% additional damage. Critical Blades increase that bonus to 75%.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Critical Blades?
faq.a: Shadow Fury, Spiritmonger, and Death Slayer are among the strongest users because they benefit from both the increased Critical Damage and Spell Power.

faq.q: Do Critical Blades work well with other critical strike items?
faq.a: Yes. Critical Blades become significantly stronger when combined with items that increase Critical Strike Chance.

BladesOfCriticalHit.description: Critical Blades is a Legendary item unlocked by upgrading Shadow Fury. The item provides Spell Power, Physical Critical Strike Chance, and its unique effect increases the maximum Critical Damage multiplier. Normally, Critical Strikes in Spelltroum deal 50% additional damage. Critical Blades increases this limit to 75%, making every successful critical strike significantly more powerful. Because of this, Critical Blades is one of the strongest items for heroes that rely on physical damage and critical strike builds.

RefresherStaff.whyUse: Refresher Staff is designed for heroes that rely heavily on active abilities. The item itself provides useful stats through additional Health, Mana, and Spell Power, but its greatest value comes from the ability to reset cooldowns. A well-timed Refresher Rune can completely change a fight by allowing a hero to cast their strongest abilities twice in succession. Unlike pure damage items, Refresher Staff rewards planning, timing, and ability management. Heroes with powerful active abilities often gain much more value from Refresher Staff than from traditional damage items.
weaknesses: Relies on finding Refresher Runes
Requires good timing to maximize value
Provides less direct damage than dedicated offensive items
New players often underestimate the best moments to use it
tips: Save Refresher Runes for important fights whenever possible.
Heroes with strong active abilities gain the most value.
Refresher does not affect the Basic Attack ability.
Bush-heavy maps naturally increase the value of the item.
A single Refresher Rune can completely change a team fight.
Consider carrying a Refresher Rune before engaging an important enemy.

bestHeroes.faerie: Refresher Staff is one of the strongest utility items for Faerie. Both of her active abilities benefit tremendously from cooldown resets. A Refresher Rune allows her to immediately cast another flight or another area attack, dramatically increasing both her damage and mobility.
bestHeroes.grizzly: Grizzly has one of the strongest interactions with Refresher Staff. His Health-enhancing ability can be cast twice using a Refresher Rune. This allows him to gain an enormous amount of bonus Health and become extremely difficult to eliminate. In some situations, this can transform Grizzly into one of the tankiest heroes in the game.
bestHeroes.mortifier: Mortifier gains tremendous value from Refresher Staff. A Refresher Rune allows him to place additional bombs and immediately reuse his swap ability. This creates dangerous combinations that can catch opponents off guard and significantly increase his impact during fights.

faq.q: How do I unlock Refresher Staff?
faq.a: Refresher Staff is a Mystic item and is available from the beginning of the game.

faq.q: What does Refresher Staff do?
faq.a: Refresher Staff provides Health, Mana, Spell Power, and allows heroes to discover Refresher Runes while destroying bushes.

faq.q: Does Refresher Rune refresh the Basic Attack ability?
faq.a: No. The Basic Attack ability is not affected.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Refresher Staff?
faq.a: Faerie, Grizzly, and Mortifier are among the strongest users because they gain tremendous value from casting their active abilities multiple times.

faq.q: Is Refresher Staff a damage item?
faq.a: Not primarily. While it provides some offensive stats through Spell Power, its greatest strength comes from refreshing cooldowns and enabling powerful ability combinations.

RefresherStaff.description: Refresher Staff is a Mystic item available from the beginning of the game. The item provides Health, Mana, and Spell Power, but its true strength comes from its unique ability to generate Refresher Runes while destroying bushes. When a hero finds a Refresher Rune, they gain a temporary Refresher ability. Activating it instantly refreshes the cooldowns of the hero's second and third abilities. The effect does not refresh the Basic Attack ability, but it allows heroes to immediately cast their active abilities again. Because of this, Refresher Staff can completely change a hero's playstyle and create powerful combinations that are impossible with most other items.

ArchmagesExecutioner.description: Archmage's Executioner is a Mystic item available from the beginning of the game. Like all axes, it grants Movement Speed at its final upgrade level. However, its primary purpose is not mobility, but Cooldown Reduction. The item is designed for heroes that rely on casting abilities as often as possible. It provides Health, Spell Power, Cooldown Reduction, and eventually Movement Speed, making it one of the strongest utility items for ability-focused builds. For many heroes, Archmage's Executioner can completely change their playstyle by allowing them to use abilities far more frequently than normal.
ArchmagesExecutioner.whyUse: Archmage's Executioner is one of the easiest ways to gain significant Cooldown Reduction early in a match. The first upgrade provides additional Health, which is valuable because most heroes benefit greatly from having at least one source of bonus Health early in the game. The second upgrade unlocks Cooldown Reduction, making the item immediately useful for heroes that rely heavily on abilities. Because Cooldown Reduction becomes available so early, players can quickly build around frequent spell usage without needing to fully upgrade the item first. The item also provides Spell Power, making it particularly attractive for magical heroes. Finally, at maximum upgrade level, it grants Movement Speed, allowing heroes to remain mobile without necessarily purchasing Boots.
strengths: Grants Movement Speed at maximum level
Strong synergy with other cooldown reduction items
weaknesses: Provides less raw damage than dedicated offensive items
Requires ability-focused heroes to reach full value
Less useful for heroes that rely mostly on basic attacks
Maximum Movement Speed bonus requires full upgrades
tips: Upgrade the item to level 2 early if Cooldown Reduction is your priority.
Combine it with Shuriken for powerful cooldown-focused builds.
The item is strongest on heroes that rely heavily on active abilities.
It can partially replace Boots for heroes that only need moderate Movement Speed.
Spell Power increases the effectiveness of many magical abilities.
Cooldown Reduction often provides more value than raw damage in longer fights.

faq.q: Why is Cooldown Reduction important?
faq.a: Cooldown Reduction allows heroes to cast abilities more frequently, increasing both damage output and utility.

Glove.whyUse: Azure Gloves dramatically increase Attack Speed. Heroes that already deal high damage often gain enormous value from attacking more frequently. Faster attacks mean more damage, more farming speed, more ability interactions, and more opportunities to trigger item effects. However, Azure Gloves are usually not an item that players rush to level 4 immediately. In many situations, upgrading the item once or twice early provides enough Attack Speed to gain a noticeable advantage. Players often finish upgrading the item later in the match once they have acquired additional damage sources. Because Attack Speed scales with other offensive stats, Azure Gloves become stronger as the game progresses.
strengths: Provides a massive Attack Speed increase
Scales well into the late game
Excellent for heroes with high base damage
Improves stun and critical strike builds
weaknesses: Provides no Health
Provides no Armor or Magic Resistance
Provides no direct damage bonus
Less effective on heroes that already attack very quickly
Usually requires other offensive items to reach maximum value
tips: Azure Gloves are strongest on heroes that already have high damage.
Consider upgrading the item once or twice early and finishing it later.
Attack Speed improves farming efficiency.
The item becomes stronger when combined with damage items.
More attacks mean more opportunities to trigger item effects.
Azure Gloves pair exceptionally well with Stunning Hammer.

bestHeroes.stonewarden: Azure Gloves are one of the strongest offensive items for Stonewarden. His Basic Attack naturally deals high damage but attacks more slowly. Azure Gloves help offset this weakness by significantly increasing Attack Speed. This allows Stonewarden to attack more frequently while maintaining his powerful hits.
bestHeroes.spiritmonger: Spiritmonger can gain tremendous value from Azure Gloves. As she collects Souls, her damage becomes increasingly threatening. Additional Attack Speed allows her to apply that damage much more frequently. The result is a hero that can attack both quickly and extremely hard.
bestHeroes.grizzly: Azure Gloves work exceptionally well on Grizzly. His damage increases as he continues attacking the same target. More Attack Speed means he reaches higher damage levels much faster. Against durable enemies, this can dramatically increase his overall damage output.

faq.q: How do I unlock Azure Gloves?
faq.a: Azure Gloves are a Mystic item and are available from the beginning of the game.

faq.q: What do Azure Gloves do?
faq.a: Azure Gloves provide a large amount of Attack Speed and are designed for heroes that want to attack more frequently.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Azure Gloves?
faq.a: Stonewarden, Spiritmonger, and Grizzly are among the strongest users because they already have strong attacks that benefit greatly from additional Attack Speed.

faq.q: Should I upgrade Azure Gloves to maximum level immediately?
faq.a: Usually not. Many players upgrade the item one or two times early and finish upgrading it later after acquiring additional damage items.

Glove.description: Azure Gloves is a Mystic item available from the beginning of the game. The item focuses entirely on one thing: Attack Speed. Unlike many other items that provide multiple bonuses, Azure Gloves are designed for heroes that already have strong attacks and simply need to attack faster. For some heroes, increasing Attack Speed provides a larger damage increase than purchasing additional damage items. Because of this, Azure Gloves can become one of the most effective offensive items in the right build.

GloveMidas.description: Goldswift Gloves is a Common item unlocked through Daily Rewards. The item provides Attack Speed, Health, and one of the strongest economy effects in Spelltroum: bonus gold from every coin collected. Whenever the hero picks up a coin, Goldswift Gloves grant an additional 10 gold on top of the coin's normal value. Because of this, the item is designed for heroes that want to farm aggressively, reach their core items faster, and build an economic advantage early in the match.
GloveMidas.whyUse: Goldswift Gloves are all about accelerating your economy. Unlike most items that directly increase combat power, Goldswift Gloves help heroes earn more gold throughout the game. The first upgrade immediately unlocks the bonus gold effect, making it useful from the moment it is purchased. This creates an interesting choice for players. Instead of investing heavily into combat stats early, they can invest into faster farming and potentially earn much more gold over the course of the match. The second upgrade provides additional Health, helping farming-oriented heroes survive while collecting resources. Later upgrades grant Attack Speed, improving farming speed even further by allowing heroes to clear bushes more quickly.
strengths: Generates additional gold throughout the match
Helps reach expensive item builds faster
weaknesses: Provides less immediate combat power than many other items
Requires time to generate value
Less effective in highly aggressive matches
Becomes weaker when purchased late
Can delay important combat items if bought at the wrong time
tips: Purchase the item early to maximize gold generation.
The first upgrade is usually the most important.
Heroes that farm quickly gain the most value.
Attack Speed helps improve farming efficiency.
The item becomes weaker when purchased late.
Consider your matchup before investing in an economy-focused build.

bestHeroes.druid: Goldswift Gloves are one of the best farming items for Druid. His summon helps clear bushes quickly, allowing him to collect coins efficiently and fully utilize the bonus gold effect. Players who prefer a farming-focused Druid playstyle often gain tremendous value from purchasing Goldswift Gloves early.
bestHeroes.volcarn: Vulkarn benefits greatly from reaching his item spikes as quickly as possible. Because he relies heavily on items to reach his full potential, the additional income generated by Goldswift Gloves can accelerate his progression significantly. The extra Health also helps him survive while farming during the early game.
bestHeroes.stonewarden: Stonewarden gains value from both the economy effect and the Attack Speed bonuses. The additional Attack Speed helps offset his naturally slower attacks, while the bonus gold allows him to reach powerful item combinations earlier.
bestHeroes.freezi: Freezi can use Goldswift Gloves to accelerate her farming and reach key items more quickly. The additional income often translates into faster power spikes and greater map control throughout the match.

faq.q: How do I unlock Goldswift Gloves?
faq.a: Goldswift Gloves are unlocked through Daily Rewards.

faq.q: What do Goldswift Gloves do?
faq.a: Goldswift Gloves provide Attack Speed, Health, and bonus gold whenever coins are collected.

faq.q: When should I buy Goldswift Gloves?
faq.a: Usually as early as possible. The earlier you buy the item, the more bonus gold you can earn during the match.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Goldswift Gloves?
faq.a: Druid, Vulkarn, Stonewarden, and Freezi are among the strongest users because they can farm efficiently and take advantage of the additional income.

faq.q: Are Goldswift Gloves good in every match?
faq.a: No. If you are constantly fighting and unable to farm coins, the item may take too long to pay for itself.

faq.q: Do Goldswift Gloves become weaker later in the game?
faq.a: Yes. Since the item earns value over time, buying it late usually provides significantly less benefit than purchasing it early.

RingOfProtection.whyUse: Guardian Ring is designed for heroes that want to stay alive while constantly pressuring enemies. The large amount of armor makes heroes significantly harder to kill, especially heroes that already have large Health pools. Its most important feature, however, is the Speed Rune effect. Whenever the hero uses an ability, Guardian Ring grants a temporary burst of Movement Speed. This allows players to close the distance to enemies, maintain pressure during fights, or reposition after casting a spell. The Speed Rune effect becomes available from the first upgrade, meaning many players purchase a single level early and finish upgrading the item later when additional armor becomes more valuable.
strengths: Grants temporary Movement Speed after casting abilities
Effective against both physical and magical damage
The main effect is available from the first upgrade
weaknesses: Provides no direct damage increase
Less valuable for heroes with few active abilities
Requires ability usage to gain the movement speed bonus
Provides less permanent movement speed than dedicated mobility items
tips: The Speed Rune effect is available from the first upgrade.
Many players buy the first level early and finish upgrading later.
Heroes with multiple active abilities gain the most value.
The item is especially effective on heroes that need help chasing enemies.
Large Health pools become significantly stronger when combined with the item's armor bonuses.
Guardian Ring provides both survivability and mobility in a single item slot.

bestHeroes.grizzly: Guardian Ring works surprisingly well on Viverna. She has two active abilities that can repeatedly trigger the Speed Rune effect. This allows her to attack, reposition, retreat, and re-engage much more effectively than normal. The additional armor also improves her survivability against both magical and physical damage.
bestHeroes.mortifier: Mortifier benefits greatly from Guardian Ring. Both his Bomb and Swap abilities activate the Speed Rune effect. As a melee hero, additional Movement Speed is extremely valuable because it helps him stay in range of enemies and create opportunities for his abilities. The defensive stats also make him significantly harder to eliminate during extended fights.

faq.q: How do I unlock Guardian Ring?
faq.a: Guardian Ring is unlocked by upgrading Grizzly.

faq.q: What does Guardian Ring do?
faq.a: Guardian Ring provides Physical Armor, Magic Resistance, and grants a temporary Speed Rune whenever the hero uses an ability.

faq.q: Does Guardian Ring work from the first upgrade?
faq.a: Yes. The Speed Rune effect becomes available immediately at the first upgrade level.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Guardian Ring?
faq.a: Grizzly, Viverna, and Mortifier are among the strongest users because they can trigger the Speed Rune effect frequently and benefit greatly from the defensive stats.

faq.q: Is Guardian Ring a defensive item or a mobility item?
faq.a: Both. It provides substantial armor while also granting temporary bursts of speed whenever abilities are used.

faq.q: Why is Guardian Ring especially good on heroes with high Health?
faq.a: Armor and Magic Resistance become more valuable as a hero's Health increases, making Guardian Ring particularly effective on naturally tanky heroes such as Grizzly.

RingOfProtection.description: Guardian Ring is a Legendary item unlocked by upgrading Grizzly. The item provides a large amount of both Physical Armor and Magic Resistance, making it one of the strongest defensive items in Spelltroum. Its unique effect grants a temporary Speed Rune whenever the hero uses an ability. This bonus movement speed allows heroes to engage, chase, reposition, or escape much more effectively. Because of this, Guardian Ring is not only a defensive item but also a mobility item that can dramatically change a hero's playstyle.

InfinityShield.whyUse: Infinity Shield is designed for heroes that want additional durability without sacrificing utility. The first upgrade provides bonus Health, making heroes noticeably harder to kill during the early game. The second upgrade grants Damage, which helps many heroes destroy bushes in a single attack and farm more efficiently. The third and fourth upgrades unlock the Shield Rune effect and provide additional Cooldown Reduction, allowing heroes to use their abilities more frequently while also gaining access to powerful defensive runes. Unlike pure defensive items, Infinity Shield improves both survivability and ability usage.
InfinityShield.uniqueEffect: While destroying bushes, heroes have a chance to discover a Shield Rune. When activated, the Shield Rune grants +200 Physical Armor, +200 Magic Resistance, and greatly increased survivability for 5 seconds. This is one of the strongest defensive rune effects in the game. During those 5 seconds, heroes become extremely difficult to kill with physical and magical damage. The effect is powerful enough to completely change the outcome of a fight when activated at the right moment. Because the rune is stored until activated, players can save it for critical moments, such as surviving a burst combo, diving into a fight, or protecting themselves while escaping. However, Shield Rune does not protect against Pure Damage. Heroes that rely on Pure Damage can still deal significant damage even while the shield is active.
strengths: Improves survivability against both physical and magical damage
One of the strongest defensive rune effects in the game
weaknesses: Requires bush farming to generate Shield Runes
Provides less direct damage than offensive items
Full value depends on proper Shield Rune usage
Does not reduce Pure Damage
Not as specialized as pure defensive or pure offensive items
tips: Save Shield Runes for important fights.
The item is especially effective on heroes with large Health pools.
Cooldown Reduction becomes more valuable as heroes gain stronger abilities.
Shield Runes can prevent burst damage and one-shot attempts.
The item provides a strong balance of offense, defense, and utility.
Use Shield Rune before engaging dangerous enemies rather than after your Health becomes critically low.
Shield Rune is strongest against physical and magical burst damage.

bestHeroes.grizzly: Infinity Shield is one of the strongest defensive items for Grizzly. Grizzly already has one of the largest Health pools in the game. When he activates a Shield Rune, the additional armor becomes extremely valuable because armor scales exceptionally well with large amounts of Health. This combination makes Grizzly incredibly difficult to kill during fights.
bestHeroes.druid: Infinity Shield works very well on Mortifier. He frequently uses both of his active abilities, making Cooldown Reduction highly valuable. The additional Damage helps him clear bushes more efficiently, while the Shield Rune can save him when enemies attempt to burst him down. A well-timed Shield Rune often allows Mortifier to survive long enough to place bombs or execute a successful swap play.

faq.q: How do I unlock Infinity Shield?
faq.a: Infinity Shield is a Mystic item and is available from the beginning of the game.

faq.q: What does Infinity Shield do?
faq.a: Infinity Shield provides Health, Damage, Cooldown Reduction, and allows heroes to discover Shield Runes while destroying bushes.

faq.q: What does a Shield Rune do?
faq.a: A Shield Rune grants +200 Physical Armor and +200 Magic Resistance for 5 seconds, making the hero significantly harder to kill.

faq.q: Does Shield Rune block Pure Damage?
faq.a: No. Shield Rune only grants Physical Armor and Magic Resistance. Physical and magical damage are heavily reduced while the shield is active, but Pure Damage ignores the shield and deals its normal amount of damage.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Infinity Shield?
faq.a: Grizzly, Druid, and Mortifier are among the strongest users because they benefit from both the defensive stats and the cooldown reduction.

faq.q: Can Shield Runes help against burst damage?
faq.a: Yes. Shield Rune grants +200 Physical Armor and +200 Magic Resistance for 5 seconds, making it one of the strongest tools for surviving burst damage and all-in engagements. However, Pure Damage is not reduced by the shield.

faq.q: Should I fully upgrade Infinity Shield immediately?
faq.a: Not always. Many players upgrade it gradually, taking advantage of the early Health and Damage bonuses before completing the final levels later in the match.

InfinityShield.description: Infinity Shield is a Mystic item available from the beginning of the game. The item provides Health, Damage, Cooldown Reduction, and the ability to discover Shield Runes while destroying bushes. A Shield Rune grants a powerful defensive effect that significantly increases both Physical Armor and Magic Resistance for a short time. When activated at the right moment, it can completely change the outcome of a fight by allowing a hero to survive damage that would normally be lethal. Because of its combination of survivability, cooldown reduction, and utility, Infinity Shield is one of the most versatile defensive items in Spelltroum.

SilenceBlade.whyUse: Helmet of Silence is designed to counter heroes that rely heavily on abilities, healing, or lifesteal. The item itself already provides useful combat stats: Physical Armor for survivability, Attack Speed for increased damage output, and additional Mana for more frequent ability usage. However, the main reason players buy Helmet of Silence is access to Silence Runes. A well-timed Silence Rune can completely shut down an enemy hero for several seconds, preventing them from escaping, healing, or using powerful abilities.
SilenceBlade.uniqueEffect: While destroying bushes, heroes have a chance to discover a Silence Rune. When activated, the rune creates a silence effect around the hero. Enemies affected by Silence cannot use abilities, can only use Basic Attacks, cannot activate healing abilities, cannot benefit from lifesteal effects, cannot use healing consumables, and cannot restore Health through other healing effects. The silence lasts for 5 seconds, which is often long enough to decide an entire fight. Additionally, activating the rune deals 1 point of damage to affected enemies. Although the damage is insignificant, it can interrupt Health regeneration timers and prevent enemies from immediately starting their natural regeneration.
weaknesses: Requires bush farming to generate runes
Less effective against heroes that rely mostly on Basic Attacks
Provides less direct damage than dedicated offensive items
Full value depends on proper Silence Rune usage
tips: Save Silence Runes for important fights.
Use Silence immediately after crowd control effects for maximum impact.
Silence is especially effective against heroes that rely on healing.
The rune can prevent enemies from escaping with abilities.
The 1 damage activation can interrupt regeneration timers.
Attack Speed increases the item's overall offensive value.

bestHeroes.grizzly: Helmet of Silence is an excellent item for Grizzly. He wants to stay close to enemies and continuously pressure them. After jumping onto a target, Grizzly can activate a Silence Rune and prevent the enemy from escaping with abilities. Combined with his durability and sustained damage, this creates a very dangerous situation for most opponents.
bestHeroes.freezi: Viverna benefits from the item's aggressive utility. She can engage an enemy, apply poison and damage effects, then activate Silence to prevent the target from responding with abilities. Against heroes that rely on defensive skills or healing, this can be devastating.

faq.q: How do I unlock Helmet of Silence?
faq.a: Helmet of Silence is a Mystic item and is available from the beginning of the game.

faq.q: What does Helmet of Silence do?
faq.a: Helmet of Silence provides Physical Armor, Attack Speed, Mana, and allows heroes to discover Silence Runes while destroying bushes.

faq.q: What does Silence do?
faq.a: Silence prevents affected enemies from using abilities for 5 seconds. They can only use Basic Attacks.

faq.q: Does Silence stop healing?
faq.a: Yes. While silenced, enemies cannot benefit from lifesteal, healing abilities, healing consumables, or other Health restoration effects.

faq.q: Which heroes benefit most from Helmet of Silence?
faq.a: Grizzly, Freezi, and Viverna are among the strongest users because they can take full advantage of the silence effect during combat.

SilenceBlade.description: Helmet of Silence is a Mystic item available from the beginning of the game. The item provides Physical Armor, Attack Speed, and Mana, making it a solid choice for heroes that want both survivability and offensive power. Its unique effect allows heroes to discover Silence Runes while destroying bushes. These runes can completely change the outcome of a fight by preventing enemies from using abilities and stopping all forms of healing. Because of this, Helmet of Silence is one of the strongest anti-healing and anti-caster items in Spelltroum.

Splash.whyUse: Fairy Staff is designed for heroes that rely heavily on magical damage. The item increases Magic Critical Damage, allowing critical hits to deal significantly more damage than normal. Normally, a Magic Critical Strike deals 50% bonus damage. Fairy Staff increases this bonus to 75%, making every successful critical hit much more impactful. The item also provides a small amount of Magic Critical Strike Chance. While the chance alone is relatively low, Fairy Staff becomes extremely powerful when combined with other items that increase Magic Critical Strike Chance. Additionally, the bonus Health makes magical heroes noticeably more durable during fights.
Splash.uniqueEffect: Starting from Level 2, Fairy Staff gains its unique support effect. Whenever the owner uses a Health Potion or a Mana Potion, the same effect is automatically applied to a nearby ally. This allows support-oriented heroes to help their teammates recover Health and Mana without using additional resources. In team-based modes, this effect can create a significant advantage during extended fights and farming sessions.

DarkSplash.whyUse: Dark Splash provides several powerful benefits for magical heroes. The first upgrade grants Magic Critical Strike Chance, allowing players to gain access to magical critical hits very early in the game. The second upgrade grants Health and applies Magic Armor Reduction to enemies. This debuff increases the damage dealt by magical abilities, making it especially powerful when multiple magic heroes focus the same target. The third and fourth upgrades unlock the item's signature mechanic: Dark Splash damage triggered by Health Potions. This allows heroes to heal themselves while simultaneously damaging weakened enemies nearby.
DarkSplash.uniqueEffect: Starting from Level 3, Dark Splash gains its unique execution effect. Whenever the owner uses a Health Potion, the owner is healed normally and the nearest enemy within range takes Dark Splash damage. The effect only works if the target is below 70% Health. Bushes cannot be targeted. The nearest target can be either an enemy hero or a creep. This restriction prevents players from repeatedly using potions to deal free damage to healthy targets. The effect is intended to help finish weakened enemies during fights rather than act as a primary source of damage. Because the target is selected automatically, positioning becomes important when using Health Potions.

FireSphere.whyUse: Fire Sphere is designed for heroes that actively weave abilities and attacks together. The item grants bonus Health, Physical Armor, Magic Resistance, a small Movement Speed bonus, and Charged Attacks after casting abilities. Unlike many items that simply increase stats, Fire Sphere changes how a hero is played. Players are encouraged to cast an ability and immediately follow up with a basic attack to maximize damage output. At higher upgrade levels, the bonus Magic Damage becomes significant and can heavily influence fights.
FireSphere.uniqueEffect: The signature effect of Fire Sphere is Charged Attack. Whenever the owner uses one of their two active abilities, the next basic attack becomes empowered and deals bonus Magic Damage. The effect does not trigger from the hero's basic attack ability — only from the hero's two active abilities. The bonus is consumed when the attack successfully hits a target. If the empowered attack misses, the bonus damage is wasted. This makes timing and accuracy extremely important. At higher upgrade levels, the empowered attack can deal substantial additional Magic Damage, allowing heroes to burst opponents more effectively.

This makes Dark Sphere an excellent counter against attack-speed-focused heroes while simultaneously increasing your team's damage output.

Physical Armor Reduction also applies to the target, causing the owner and all allies to deal more physical damage to that enemy. This makes Dark Sphere particularly valuable in 2v2 matches and coordinated team fights.

DarkSphere.description: Dark Sphere is a Mystic item available from the beginning of the game. The item provides Health, a small Movement Speed bonus at higher upgrade levels, Attack Speed Reduction, and Physical Armor Reduction. Dark Sphere is designed to weaken enemy heroes rather than simply strengthen the owner. By reducing both enemy Attack Speed and Physical Armor, it makes targets significantly easier to kill, especially in team-based fights. Because of its powerful debuffs and strong Health bonuses, Dark Sphere is one of the best utility items for heroes that want to control fights and shut down fast-attacking opponents.

WaterSphere.whyUse: Water Sphere is designed for heroes that need protection against stuns, slows, poisons, armor reduction effects, and other debuffs. The item provides high Physical Armor, an increased Mana Pool, a small Movement Speed bonus, access to Clarity Runes, and additional Clarity Rune storage capacity. Unlike pure defensive items, Water Sphere focuses on keeping heroes active and mobile by removing disabling effects.
WaterSphere.uniqueEffect: While destroying bushes, heroes have a chance to discover a Clarity Rune. When picked up, the rune appears as a new ability that can be activated at any time. A Clarity Rune removes all negative effects from the hero, including stuns, slows, poison effects, Physical Armor Reduction, Magic Armor Reduction, and other debuffs. One of the most important features of Clarity Rune is its automatic stun removal — if the hero becomes stunned while carrying a Clarity Rune, the rune automatically activates, the stun is immediately removed, and the hero can continue moving and fighting. Water Sphere also allows heroes to carry an additional Clarity Rune charge, meaning a hero can store up to two Clarity Runes at the same time.

WaterSphere.description: Water Sphere is a Common item unlocked through the Daily Bonus system. The item provides a large amount of Physical Armor, additional Mana, a small Movement Speed bonus, and the ability to discover Clarity Runes while destroying bushes. Water Sphere is primarily a defensive utility item designed to counter crowd control effects, especially stuns. Its unique rune effect can automatically remove negative effects and save heroes from situations that would normally result in death. Because of its powerful anti-control mechanics, Water Sphere is one of the strongest defensive utility items in Spelltroum.
